prompt: A wide cinematic corporate boardroom scene in a bright modern glass-walled office with floor-to-ceiling windows and a panoramic city skyline faintly visible outside. Around 22 business professionals of mixed genders and ethnicities sit in a large U-shaped arrangement of light wood conference tables, each person dressed in formal business attire and many working on open laptops. At the front of the room, a huge wall-mounted digital dashboard dominates the composition, showing a futuristic financial analytics interface in dark blue and cyan with exactly 12 visible data panels: 1 large top-left panel with the headline text SELECTING THE TRACKING TOOL and line and bar charts, 1 small top-center panel with abstract circular data textures, 1 top-center-right panel with a large numeric metric reading 92.231 and chart bars, 1 top-right panel with line graphs and gear-like interface icons, 1 mid-left strip of circular gauges and technical controls, 1 center-left tall panel with vertical data bars and circular overlays, 1 center panel with three round instrument-style readouts, 1 center-right panel with compact technical diagrams and tiny UI elements, 1 mid-right horizontal panel with circular dials and a central numeric indicator, 1 lower-center panel with glowing ring charts and waveform-style graphics, 1 lower-right wide panel with dense tabular dashboard data, and 1 small bottom-center auxiliary panel. The room is viewed from a centered rear perspective, emphasizing symmetry and the semicircle of seated attendees facing the screen, with one standing presenter silhouetted near the display. Warm sunlight enters from the left, creating soft lens flare and long shadows across the wooden floor, while the overall image style is a polished high-end editorial illustration leaning toward photorealistic corporate concept art, in a cool blue and warm amber color palette, ultra-detailed, clean, futuristic, professional, and ambitious.
